rationale: Fast, simple marketing website + trial signup form. Minimal dependencies: Vue 3 for mobile-responsive UI, Gin for lightweight REST API, MySQL for signup/trial tracking. AWS infrastructure as specified in requirements. No heavy state management, caching, or background jobs needed for MVP.

frontend.bundler: Vite (^5.0.x) — fast dev server, minimal config
frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS (^3.4.x) — utility-first, mobile-first by default
frontend.components: Headless UI / Vue Headless Component Library (for accessible forms/buttons/modals) OR hand-rolled with Tailwind classes
frontend.http: axios (^1.6.x) — simple Promise-based HTTP client for trial signup API calls
frontend.routing: Vue Router (^4.2.x) — for marketing homepage, college partners page, FAQ, etc.
frontend.build: Deployed to AWS S3 + CloudFront (static assets, spa-mode routing via 404 redirect to index.html)

backend.framework: Gin Web Framework (^1.9.x) — lightweight REST API for trial signup, auth, tracking
backend.language: Go (^1.21.x) — compiled, statically typed, minimal runtime overhead
backend.orm: GORM (^1.25.x) — Go ORM for MySQL operations (signup records, trial tracking)
backend.authentication: JWT (via go-jwt library, ^4.5.x) — stateless, signed tokens for trial session validation
backend.middleware: Built-in Gin middleware for CORS, request logging, error handling
backend.logging: Structured logging (zap or built-in log package) for debugging trial signup flow

database.primary: MySQL 8.0 (AWS RDS, Multi-AZ for trial data durability)
database.migrations: golang-migrate (^4.16.x) OR GORM AutoMigrate for schema versioning
database.cache: Not required for MVP — session/trial state stored in MySQL. Redis can be added post-launch if trial validation becomes a bottleneck.
database.backup: AWS RDS automated backups (daily snapshots, 30-day retention)

hosting.frontend: AWS S3 (static website hosting) + CloudFront (CDN, SSL/TLS, edge caching)
hosting.backend: AWS EC2 (t3.medium or ECS Fargate for container-based deployment) — serves /api/* endpoints
hosting.database: AWS RDS MySQL 8.0 (managed database, automated backups, Multi-AZ failover)
hosting.load_balancer: AWS Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of backend for HA and SSL termination

integrations.email: AWS SES (Simple Email Service) — for trial signup confirmation and college partner inquiries
integrations.analytics: Google Analytics 4 OR Amazon CloudWatch for signup funnel tracking and visitor metrics (optional MVP, required for success measurement per requirements)
integrations.error_tracking: AWS CloudWatch Logs or Sentry — for backend error monitoring and debugging
integrations.secrets_management: AWS Secrets Manager — for database credentials, API keys, JWT signing key
integrations.monitoring: AWS CloudWatch (metrics, alarms) — monitor trial signup rate, API latency, database health

security.owasp_top_10: Applied throughout: input validation (forms + backend), SQL injection prevention (GORM ORM), XSS mitigation (Vue templating), CSRF tokens (if needed), HTTPS only, secure headers (Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options)
security.authentication: JWT tokens (stateless); trial access validated on each request
security.trial_revocation: Backend logic to expire trial tokens at signup.trial_expires_at; frontend redirects to login on 401 response
security.data_privacy: Encrypt PII in transit (TLS) and at rest (AWS RDS encryption); comply with Indian student data protection standards (specifics per product team confirmation)

deployment.frontend_ci_cd: GitHub Actions → build with Vite → upload to S3 → invalidate CloudFront cache
deployment.backend_ci_cd: GitHub Actions → build Go binary → push Docker image to AWS ECR → deploy to ECS/EC2
deployment.database_migrations: Run golang-migrate before backend deployment to ensure schema is in sync
deployment.infrastructure_as_code: Terraform (optional but recommended) — define S3, CloudFront, RDS, ALB, security groups

open_questions: College partnership referral mechanism (direct link, QR code, email campaign) — affects tracking implementation detail
Trial duration (30 days vs. 1 calendar month) — affects trial_expires_at calculation
India-specific compliance libraries or frameworks (data protection, payment if applicable) — to be confirmed
Affiliate tracking structure (UTM params, custom referral codes) — affects signup form and analytics
